author: gb9t
content:
00-rust-conventions.md Q1+Q2 resolved (user direction 2026-05-09): both recommendations accepted.

D1: Issue #3 (Rookery clippy lints) is a HARD prerequisite for any non-foundation implementation work. Subsystem-implementation issues will block on #3 as they're created. Rationale: codebase grows under enforcement; retrofitting produces never-cleaned #![allow(...)] escape hatches.

D2: TLC is the default for 'make tla'. Models opt into Apalache via '(* APALACHE *)' preamble for state-space-too-large or parametric/unbounded properties. Both run via the same kbuild target.

Conventions doc now has 0 open blocks. Ready for review.

Phase A remaining: 00-glossary.md (kernel terminology baseline; ≥40 terms with upstream references per AC-5 of 00-overview.md) and 00-index.md (master registry of every design doc with tier/status/summary). Proceeding now.
